title: Advancements Plus
description: Adds more vanilla-like advancements to the game.
body:
📰 Origin:

Advancements+ was made with the intent on adding more advancements to accomplish and that should be in the vanilla game itself.
_________________________________________________________________________________________________________

⬇️ What Is This?:

Advancements+ Adds More Advancements to Minecraft that feel Vanilla. This Mod just Adds Advancements to the vanilla namespace, that's no new blocks or items just more advancements to accomplish.
_______________________________________________________________________________________

⭐ New Advancements:

- Shield UP!
- This Flesh Ain't Tastin' So Good

___________________________________________________________________________________________

❔ Forge Port:

There will not be a forge port of this mod, Although I have no problem with someone doing so. Just contact me on discord: penguindevv
_____________________________________________________________________________________

🟢 Status: 

This project is being worked on!
_____________________________________________________________________
